name: operator-differential-expression-r
description: Built-in atomic operator plugin: Single differential-expression operator powered by base R.

interface.shortDescription: Single differential-expression operator powered by base R
interface.longDescription: Provides one atomic dependency-light Welch-test differential expression operator for feature-by-sample matrices and sample metadata groups.
defaultPrompt: Expose the differential expression R operator and run it with my matrix and metadata.
